description_long: This is a rectangular, open-topped storage box constructed primarily from wood, with three large, inset gray panels on each of its longer sides. The wood has a weathered, brown finish, giving the box a rustic and utilitarian appearance suitable for outdoor or industrial use. The interior is spacious and unlined, with visible wood grain and no internal dividers or compartments. The box lacks any visible handles, lids, or locking mechanisms, emphasizing its simple, functional design. The gray panels appear to be made of a different material, possibly metal or painted wood, and are framed by the wooden structure. The overall build suggests durability and capacity for holding bulky or heavy items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces.
description: A large, open-topped rectangular wooden storage box with gray inset panels and a weathered finish, designed for robust urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large gray inset panels framed by weathered wood, with an open top and no visible handles or lid.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a single gray panel and the box's depth, with the open interior visible and no handles or lid present.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with three gray inset panels and the same open-topped wooden construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single gray panel, showing the box's length and open interior.
